mapper.sql: id, perm_code, perm_name, type, parent_id, path, sort, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE perm_code = #{permCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (perm_code, perm_name, type, parent_id, path, sort, status, deleted, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{permCode}, #{permName}, #{type}, #{parentId}, #{path}, #{sort}, #{status}, 0, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET perm_code = #{permCode}, perm_name = #{permName}, type = #{type}, parent_id = #{parentId}, path = #{path}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_permission SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE type = #{type} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT FROM sys_permission
deleted = 0
AND perm_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{permName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
